  "decision": "fail",

  "findings": [
    "Blowout evidence on formwork indicates bracing or tie capacity was exceeded during placement",
    "Form panels and bracing assemblies are installed-defective and cannot be accepted as-is",
    "Potential compromise to concrete section geometry and rebar position behind failed form area",
    "Remaining formwork may be under-designed or under-braced relative to actual placement loads"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop concrete placement in affected area immediately",
    "Quarantine and inspect failed form section for extent of damage to concrete, rebar, and adjacent forms",
    "Review form design calculations and bracing layout against ACI 347 load requirements",
    "Replace or redesign failed form panels and bracing before any further placement",
    "Inspect all remaining formwork for similar under-bracing or inadequate tie patterns",
    "Document blowout location, probable cause, and corrective measures for engineer review"
  ],
  "rationale": "Blowout evidence on roughed-in formwork is a critical failure indicating the form and bracing system could not sustain placement loads per ACI 347. The work cannot pass until the failed section is replaced, root cause is determined, and all remaining formwork is verified for adequate design and bracing capacity.",
  "references": ["ACI 347"]
}
